8R4Xau6z3j.fact: Missing metadata directory is not an error — ReadSnapshots returns (nil, nil) for nonexistent dirs. Most projects have no metadata. Same pattern as config.Load returning zero-value for missing config file.

Cnfghh937T.fact: If you changed metadata behavior (snapshots, heads, retention, sync), update docs/metadata-system.md to reflect the change.

ajYx3iIrOf.fact: The metadata system is documented in docs/metadata-system.md — read it for context on snapshot format, sync safety, retention, and design decisions.
